# English Chat Site Project

This project is a Next.js application for an English learning chat website that connects with a Spring Boot backend.

## Project Features

- Main page (landing page)
- Chat pages (User chat and AI chat)
- My Page (user profile)
- Learning Notes (vocabulary tracking)
- Authentication (login/signup)
- Header and footer components
- Korean-English translation integration
- Automatic vocabulary tracking for learning notes

## Architecture

- Frontend: Next.js with React
- Backend: Spring Boot (to be integrated)
- Translation: AI-powered Korean to English
- Auto-save unknown words to learning notes

## Development Guidelines

- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Implement responsive design
- Follow Next.js best practices
- Prepare for Spring Boot API integration
